summary: gate:gate_evidence passes: current gate-evidence projection filters false blockers, binds story artifact refs, excludes full DAG payloads, and has semantic regression coverage.
inspection_summary: Inspected review request, implementation, CLI routing, tests, docs, generated PR artifacts, and ran focused read-only projection/test checks for gate-evidence and regression paths.
inspection_evidence: Focused test command passed 4/4; projection check on .vibepro/pr/story-vibepro-bounded-artifact-view/pr-prepare.json produced gate-evidence with no <story-id>, no full nodes/edges, 11 required semantic blockers, and no non-required or present/pending blockers.
inspection_inputs: node --test --test-name-pattern 'pr prepare json emits progress on stderr and records stage diagnostics|pr prepare summary-json emits bounded LLM projection instead of full diagnostics|pr prepare view emits focused bounded projection for blocking gates|pr prepare gate-evidence view binds refs and excludes informational nodes from blockers' test/vibepro-cli.test.js
node projection checks using projectPrPrepareForLlm(..., 'gate-evidence') and all bounded views
judgment_delta: Initial concern was that the previous false blockers, unbound <story-id> refs, and weak tests might remain; final judgment is pass because implementation now filters only required non-passing gate nodes, binds placeholders across projections, preserves --json full output, documents bounded handoff surfaces, and focused tests plus current artifact projection verify the contract.
